4. Make a second request to

The purpose of the 'strict' field in a function definition is to ensure that function calls reliably adhere to the function schema, instead of being best effort. When 'strict' is set to 'true', the model will enforce strict mode for the function call.
additionalProperties must be set to false for each object in the parameters, and all fields in properties must be marked as required.
